name: German Chocolate Upside Down Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a 9x13 inch cake pan.
2. Spread the coconut and chopped pecans evenly in the bottom of the prepared pan.
3. Mix the German Chocolate cake mix according to the package directions.
4. Pour the batter over the nuts and coconut layer.
5. In a separate bowl, beat together the cream cheese, softened margarine, and powdered sugar until smooth.
6. Drop spoonfuls of this mixture on top of the cake layers.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
